steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The logical relationship is contrast. Sentence 2 defines a holotype as the original specimen used in the first description. The blank needs a transition signaling that sentence 3 introduces a different type of reference organism (a neotype) that is specifically not the original specimen.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A — "By contrast": signals that the neotype differs from the holotype just described — exactly the holotype-vs-neotype distinction the passage draws, so fits. ✓
  • Choice B — "Moreover": signals addition at the same level. It would imply the neotype shares the same key feature as the holotype (being the original specimen), but the passage explicitly says it does not. ✗
  • Choice C — "Admittedly": signals a concession the author grants reluctantly. No concession is being made — the passage is straightforwardly defining two distinct categories. ✗
  • Choice D — "For instance": signals that the G. inflata neotype is a specific example of the holotype category just defined. But the neotype is a different category entirely, not an example of the holotype. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
